issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Missing permissions required by NotificationExtensionsKt.notify: android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
Missing dataSync foregroundServiceType in the AndroidManifest.xml
A newer version of androidx.compose.runtime:runtime than 1.6.7 is available: 1.11.2
Using Configuration.screenWidthDp instead of LocalWindowInfo.current.containerSize
Using Configuration.screenWidthDp instead of LocalWindowInfo.current.containerSize
Reading Resources using LocalContext.current.resources
Reading Resources using LocalContext.current.resources
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Overriding `@string/copy` which is marked as private in androidx.preference:preference:1.2.1. If deliberate, use tools:override="true", otherwise pick a different name.
`remember` calls must not return `Unit`
The native library `arm64-v8a/libimagedecoder.so` (from `com.github.tachiyomiorg:image-decoder:41c059e540`) is not 16 KB aligned

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).
Formatting %d followed by words ("blocked"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("blocked"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 34
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 27

This folder configuration (`v27`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 34. Merge all the resources in this folder into `values`.
This folder configuration (`v31`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 34. Merge all the resources in this folder into `values`.

Very long vector path (4609 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (4609 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Prefer `mutableLongStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableLongStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableLongStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Custom view `Pager` is missing constructor used by tools: `(Context)` or `(Context,AttributeSet)` or `(Context,AttributeSet,int)`
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?

issue.errorLine1: val scaled = Bitmap.createScaledBitmap(coarse, DHASH_WIDTH, DHASH_HEIGHT, true)

issue.message: Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.toDrawable` instead?
Use version catalog instead
Custom view `Pager` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Custom view `ReaderButton` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Custom view `WebtoonRecyclerView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Custom view `WebtoonSubsamplingImageView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
